JUDGE PRO TEM:MARY ELLEN WISS/CLERK:ECLAVERIA/RPTR: SHERRY SAWYER 2:50PM: C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. PLFF'S CSL ARNOLD EVJE APPEARED FOR PLFF, AND DEFT PRESENT AND REPRESENTING HERSELF. CASE SETTLED. TERMS OF SETTLEMENT REDUCED TO WRITING W/C WAS SIGNED BY DEFT DENISE MAGGIOLO, ENTITLED "JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION MADE IN OPEN COURT". DEFT UNDERSTOOD AND AGREED TO THE TERMS AND WAS PROVIDED A COPY BY PLFF'S COUNSEL.
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAGGIOLO, DENISE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 641 O'FARRELL ST, #306, S.F., STAYED UNTIL JUL-01-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, 5PM. NO FURTHER STAYS. BACK RENTS & DAMAGES WAIVED UNLESS DEFT FAILS TO COMPLY, THEN PLTF TO HAVE AMD JUDGMENT TO INCLUDE $525- BACK RENT, $17.50 PER DIEM DAMAGES, $425- ATTY FEES AND $195- COSTS,TOTALLING $2,230-.DEFT TO LEAVE PREMISE BROOMCLEAN.PROPERTY LEFT ABANDONED.SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
